description: Style NoteFun, style and comfort are the highlights of this black bag from french connection. Carry it to college, office or for a casual day out with friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it is sure to accommodate everything you think of, while you strut around looking super cool!Product DetailsFlap on top with a plastic clasp and velcro closureZipped inner pocket with a large roomy compartmentCompartment at the back with velcro closuresAdjustable shoulder strap with claspsBranded zippers and sliders for easy useMaterial and CareShell: 100% polyester, Trim: 100% nylon and Lining: 100% polysterDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtSizeHeight: 30 cmWidth: 27 cmDepth: 9 cm
